name: io.github.jwwd-repos/modusop-mcp
description: MCP server for ModusOp — projects, tasks, time tracking, and retainers for AI assistants.

environmentVariables.name: MODUSOP_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: ModusOp API token. Create at modusop.app → Settings → API Tokens (read + write scopes).

environmentVariables.name: MODUSOP_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL. Defaults to https://modusop.app/api/v1.
